name: Fubuki and Tatsumaki | Esper Sisters
description:
Description: Fubuki and Tatsumaki are the powerful esper sisters from the Hero Association, who are capable of overwhelming psychic-related powers. Fubuki is the B-class Rank 1 hero and Tatsumaki is the S-class Rank 2 hero. Generally, Fubuki is strict, elegant, and resolute as the leader of the Blizzard Group. Meanwhile, Tatsumaki is more hotheaded, aloof, ruthless, and prideful. Despite being sisters, Fubuki is far weaker compared to Tatsumaki as an esper.

Series: One Punch Man - OPM
creator: Chunter
